meaning: n.(尤指请愿书、合同等的)签名者,签字者
examples: Recent signee Tyson Chandler, so seemingly lost in the season's first month, appears revived.
He is also a signee of Bill Gates' and Warren Buffett's Giving Pledge.
Another added challenge for the Knicks: recent free-agent signee Kenyon Martin, who's averaged 16 points and 78% shooting over his past three games, will no longer surprise opposing teams.
